project.name: Air-gapped Infrastructure
project.description: Offline installation bundles for Rocky Linux, Ubuntu, and other Linux distributions.
constraints: K8s version: Support for latest stable and project-specific versions
GitLab version: Support for latest stable and project-specific versions
Harbor version: Support for latest stable and project-specific versions
NFS Provisioner version: Support for latest stable and project-specific versions

conventions.git_commit: Include 'Co-Authored-By: Gemini CLI <noreply@google.com>' in all commit messages.

rules: Language tags for all code blocks (MD040)
